notes_for_human_reviewer: Strong submission near ceiling. Applies all four framework questions with concrete answers per workstream. Recommends explicit hybrid with workstream-by-workstream weighting. Three concrete translation moves with cadence + ownership (sprint review attendance, backlog-to-RAID feed, change control board scope). Names hybrid-without-translation as the specific failure mode being risked, with prevention. Posture: 'Both J. Patel's concerns... and K. Bell's concerns... are legitimate within their own contexts.' Falls slightly short on translation_specificity (4 not 5) — has 3 moves but could use more on the procurement / change-management seams. This is what we want every learner reading.
